examples: Another is that fans are loyal die-hards.
Such die-hards will be discard by history.
A great many of them are graduates of special training schools for die-hards.
But for Nordiques die-hards, junior hockey won't suffice, and rooting for the loathsome Canadiens was never an option.
All stocks that have direct cash benefit from gains in hards and softs are ready for a revival.
